hooks.command: .venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "import sys,json,os; d=json.load(sys.stdin); b=os.path.basename(d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path','')); (b=='.env' or (b.startswith('.env.') and b!='.env.example')) and print(json.dumps({'hookSpecificOutput':{'hookEventName':'PreToolUse','permissionDecision':'deny','permissionDecisionReason':'Blocked: .env files contain API credentials'}}))"
